items.title: markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.description_zh: 用于将文件和 Office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。

items.title: MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.description_zh: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 利用AI LLM一键生成短视频。

items.title: claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
items.description_zh: Claude Code 是一种代理编码工具，它位于您的终端中，了解您的代码库，并通过执行例行任务、解释复杂代码和处理 git 工作流程来帮助您更快地编码 - 所有这些都通过自然语言命令进行。

items.title: plugins
items.description: Cursor plugin specification and official plugins
items.description_zh: 光标插件规范和官方插件

items.title: harness
items.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
items.description_zh: 一种元技能，用于设计特定领域的代理团队、定义专业代理并生成他们使用的技能。

items.title: compound-engineering-plugin
items.description: Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more
items.description_zh: 适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等的官方复合工程插件

items.title: ECC
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
items.description_zh: 代理利用性能优化系统。 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等的技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。

items.title: VoxCPM
items.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
items.description_zh: VoxCPM2：用于多语言语音生成、创意语音设计和逼真克隆的无分词器 TTS

items.title: stable-worldmodel
items.description: A platform for reproducible world model research and evaluation
items.description_zh: 可复制世界模型研究与评估平台

items.title: project-nomad
items.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
items.description_zh: N.O.M.A.D 项目是一款独立的离线生存计算机，配备了关键工具、知识和人工智能，可让您随时随地了解情况并获得授权。

items.title: liteparse
items.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser
items.description_zh: 一个快速、有用的开源文档解析器

items.title: FlClash
items.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.
items.description_zh: 一款基于ClashMeta的多平台代理客户端，简单易用，开源无广告。

items.title: train-llm-from-scratch
items.description: A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.
items.description_zh: 培训LLM的简单方法，从下载数据到生成文本。

items.title: RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.title: data-engineering-zoomcamp
items.description: Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼
items.description_zh: 数据工程 Zoomcamp 是一门为期 9 周的免费课程，旨在构建可用于生产的数据管道。下一期将于 2026 年 1 月开始。在这里加入课程👇🏼
